headline: Not Even Musk Has The Answer To AI’s Power Shortage
summary: Tech giants are struggling to secure the power AI needs before 2028 at the earliest. One company managed to lock in cheap, abundant electricity years ago - and it's positioned to serve both AI and Bitcoin markets.
